description: Trust policies (assume role policies) for Databricks Classic (Custom VPC) workspace IAM roles

trust_policies.description: Allows the Databricks AWS account to assume the cross-account role using the Databricks account ID as an external ID.
trust_policies.notes: For GovCloud civilian: principal is 044793339203, for GovCloud DoD: principal is 170661010020. Policy is generated by the Databricks Terraform provider data source.

trust_policies.description: Allows the Databricks AWS account to assume the audit log delivery role with the for_log_delivery flag set to true.
trust_policies.notes: The for_log_delivery flag may adjust the trust policy to include log delivery specific conditions. Policy is generated by the Databricks Terraform provider data source.

trust_policies.description: Unity Catalog trust policy allowing self-assume and the Databricks Unity Catalog master role to assume the catalog role.
trust_policies.notes: The external_id comes from the Databricks storage credential. The self-assume pattern allows Unity Catalog to chain role assumptions. Policy is generated by the Databricks Terraform provider data source.
